experiments.label: clean-weight-min-tokens-100000
experiments.result: negative: quality passed, slower than promoted 65.75 tok/s mean
experiments.note: Setting restore min tokens to 100000 avoids the live parameter sanity check for prompt-sized tensors, but did not improve p512/n1536 throughput. The quality log also exposed an ocloc/IGC internal compiler floating-point exception during capture that vLLM recovered from.

experiments.label: qk-rms-xpu-helper-clean-weight
experiments.result: negative for speed: quality passed, slower than promoted 65.75 tok/s mean
experiments.note: Patched the optional Q/K RMS XPU helper to consume clean guarded Q/K norm weights. This makes the helper compatible with the clean-weight repair when enabled, but the first p512/n1536 throughput sample was not faster.
